category_sources: Official repository README describes foma as finite-state transducer technology.
source_facts.description says foma is a finite-state compiler and C library.

docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the available documentation surface and includes compilation instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mhulden/foma, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
